title: Pea and Dutch Potato Gratin
description: A creamy, comforting casserole of peas and potatoes baked until golden brown.
instructions: In a large saucepan, combine sliced onions and butter.
Cook over medium heat until onions are softened, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
In a separate saucepan, combine sliced potatoes and enough cold water to cover.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
Drain potatoes and add to the saucepan with onions and garlic.
In a separate bowl, combine grated cheese and milk.
Pour cheese mixture over potatoes and onions.
Transfer mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Top with additional grated cheese if desired.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown and bubbly.
